data.html:
# Forge Studio — Environment Variables
# Copy this to .env and fill in your values

# ─── Database ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
DATABASE_URL=postgresql://litellm_user:litellm_password_123@localhost:5434/forge_studio

# ─── Redis ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379/1

# ─── Server ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
PORT=5051
NODE_ENV=development
JWT_SECRET=change-me-to-a-secure-random-string
ALLOWED_ORIGINS=http://localhost:5051,http://localhost:8080

# ─── LLM Proxy (optional — Forge works without LiteLLM) ─────────
LITELLM_URL=http://localhost:5050
LITELLM_API_KEY=sk-ai-lab-master-key

# ─── LiteLLM Database (optional — for analytics) ────────────────
# LITELLM_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://litellm_user:litellm_password_123@localhost:5434/litellm_db

# ─── Cloudflare Tunnel (optional — for remote access) ───────────
# CLOUDFLARE_TUNNEL_TOKEN=your-tunnel-token-here
